interaction_phrase: take a deep dive into how these Colorado cities
occurrence_sentence: CNBC's "Cities of Success: Denver & Boulder" special, set to air on Thursday, April 11 at 10pm ET/PT, will take a deep dive into how these Colorado cities have emerged as burgeoning hubs of quantum computing alongside tech, life sciences, and venture capital, according to [a news release](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/03/28/cnbc-takes-cities-of-success-to-new-heights-in-colorado-for-franchises-second-stop.html) from the network.
